homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 7 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: Does this caption contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, caption completely unrelated to the audio) to 7 (best, completely related)
prompts.1: How complete is the caption with relation to the audio. Consider mood, genre, and instrumentation descriptions. Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, does not contain information) to 7 (best, contains all relevant musical information)

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track features a gentle solo guitar that creates a soft, meditative atmosphere. The slow tempo and simple rhythm produce a calming soundscape, making it an ideal choice for a quiet evening at home or a cozy coffee shop.

prompts.0: Does this caption contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, caption completely unrelated to the audio) to 7 (best, completely related)
prompts.1: How complete is the caption with relation to the audio. Consider mood, genre, and instrumentation descriptions. Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, does not contain information) to 7 (best, contains all relevant musical information)

questions.name: Sample 3
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This energetic punk rock track features a male vocalist singing at a high pitch alongside a distorted electric guitar playing a driving riff. The performance is supported by a fast-paced acoustic drum beat that creates an aggressive and lively atmosphere suitable for a live concert setting. Elements of the song clearly evoke the raw intensity often found in New York hardcore scenes from the early 1980s.

prompts.0: Does this caption contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, caption completely unrelated to the audio) to 7 (best, completely related)
prompts.1: How complete is the caption with relation to the audio. Consider mood, genre, and instrumentation descriptions. Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, does not contain information) to 7 (best, contains all relevant musical information)

questions.name: Sample 4
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental rock track features a complex and fast-paced electric guitar solo supported by a solid bass line and driving acoustic drums. The energetic atmosphere creates a dynamic soundscape well-suited for a live performance or guitar showcase. With its heavy mood and clear focus on virtuosic playing, the piece delivers an engaging musical experience that highlights the interplay between the lead instrument and rhythm section.

questions.name: Sample 10
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: A male vocalist sings in a higher key atop a medium-tempo rock rhythm driven by groovy bass lines and drumming. Emotional guitar accompaniment adds to the intense atmosphere, supported by keyboard harmony throughout the track. The composition blends elements of alternative rock with a melodic quality that fits well within a dramatic musical style.

questions.name: Sample 11
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This energetic instrumental rock track features a live drum solo filled with complex rhythms and frequent cymbal crashes. A simple bass line supports the driving beat while an electric guitar plays powerful chords throughout the fast-paced performance. The combination of these elements creates a strong, live concert feel typical of the punk-adjacent sound associated with the artist Ratpigeon.

questions.name: About You
questions.description: Please tell us about your musical background.

fields.label: How many years of musical experience do you have?
Please describe your musical experience (instruments played, training, listening habits, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g. I've played piano for 10 years and studied music theory in college...
